evidence_value: GEO states multiplexed scRNA-seq of PBMCs from 134 SLE cases and 58 healthy controls; 66 GEO Samples are listed
verified_by: P3-F015 Planner + Scientific Judge + Bioinformatics Judge
notes: Study-level evidence only; it does not establish patient-level linkage

evidence_value: GEO Sample characteristics expose field condition with inspected values SLE, healthy, and SLE flare
verified_by: P3-F015 Planner + Scientific Judge + Bioinformatics Judge
notes: Completeness across all 66 samples and patient-level linkage remain unverified

evidence_value: No explicit patient_id or donor_id field is displayed on the inspected GEO Series and representative Sample pages
verified_by: P3-F015 Planner + Scientific Judge + Bioinformatics Judge
notes: Absence from inspected pages does not prove absence from every metadata asset; no ID may be inferred from sample titles

evidence_value: GEO exposes GSM, BioSample, and SRA experiment relations but no explicit mapping from those records to individual patients on inspected pages
verified_by: P3-F015 Planner + Scientific Judge + Bioinformatics Judge
notes: Sample titles and BioSample accessions are not treated as patient IDs

evidence_value: GEO lists six processed files: flare and sle barcode TXT, gene TXT, and MTX matrices; displayed MTX sizes are 492.6 MB and 2.2 GB
verified_by: P3-F015 Planner + Scientific Judge + Bioinformatics Judge
notes: File contents were not downloaded or inspected

evidence_value: GEO states raw data are available in SRA and processed data are available on the Series record

evidence_value: SRP220690 exposes 66 public paired Illumina RNA records with GSM-to-SRX entries

evidence_value: GEO Samples state CellRanger processing, Demuxlet demultiplexing, aggregation across samples, and doublet removal

evidence_value: Aggregate donor_id and disease vocabularies are exposed separately; no explicit donor-to-disease mapping is exposed in inspected metadata

evidence_value: CELLxGENE collection metadata links GSE137029 as RAW_DATA; HCA project lists GSE137029 and GSE174188 and links the same CELLxGENE collection

evidence_value: No explicit cross-repository donor/sample/cell correspondence table was exposed in inspected public metadata

verified_by: P3-F015 Planner + Scientific Judge + Bioinformatics Judge
notes: Linked provenance is enough to reject an independence assumption but not enough to quantify overlap

evidence_value: GEO MINiML exposes four characteristics for all 66 Samples: cell type, condition, sample type, and chip antibody; no patient, donor, subject, or individual identifier field is present
verified_by: P3-F018 Planner + Scientific Judge + Bioinformatics Judge
notes: Metadata archive only; absence of a person field prevents patient-level grouping without inference

evidence_value: All 66 GEO Samples have a condition value: 42 SLE, 12 SLE flare, and 12 healthy

notes: These are pooled GEO Sample labels, not patient-level labels for 192 reported individuals

evidence_value: Linked UCSC Cell Browser metadata manifest exposes library_uuid (88 values), sample_uuid (274), donor_id (261), disease (2), and disease ontology fields for 1,263,676 cells
supports_requirement: CELLxGENE/HCA sample and donor metadata availability

evidence_value: Across selected metadata vectors: 261 donors and 274 samples; no donor maps to multiple disease values; no sample maps to multiple donors or disease values; 162 donors map to SLE and 99 to normal
verified_by: P3-F018 Planner + Scientific Judge + Bioinformatics Judge
notes: Metadata-only vectors were cross-tabulated; donor naming patterns were not used to assign labels

evidence_value: 250 donors map to one sample, 9 donors map to two samples, and 2 donors map to three samples; maximum is three samples per donor
verified_by: P3-F018 Planner + Scientific Judge + Bioinformatics Judge
notes: Timepoint and longitudinal meaning are not established by these mappings

evidence_value: The linked UCSC Cell Browser description identifies GSE174188 as its GEO Series and the same HCA project; it does not provide a record-level mapping to GSE137029
verified_by: P3-F018 Planner + Scientific Judge + Bioinformatics Judge
notes: CELLxGENE/HCA cannot be used as external validation for GSE137029 without explicit donor-level non-overlap evidence

evidence_value: The linked Zenodo record contains analysis-code files and no dedicated patient/donor metadata mapping file in its public manifest
